# MetaPerson documentation

> Documentation for MetaPerson Creator and Avatar SDK — AI-driven 3D avatar creation from a single selfie. Cloud API, SDK and plugins for Unity, Unreal Engine, iOS, Android and Web.

This file contains links to documentation sections following the llmstxt.org standard.

## Table of Contents

- [DeepMotion Animate 3D](https://docs.metaperson.avatarsdk.com/docs/3dmotion/animate3d.md): Using DeepMotion Animate 3D with MetaPerson
- [DeepMotion](https://docs.metaperson.avatarsdk.com/docs/3dmotion/deepmotion.md): Using DeepMotion Animate 3D and SayMotion with MetaPerson
- [MetaPerson 3D Motion](https://docs.metaperson.avatarsdk.com/docs/3dmotion/index.md): Modern tools and technologies have revolutionized animating 3D avatars, making this process accessible and straightforward for creators of all expe...
- [Mixamo animations](https://docs.metaperson.avatarsdk.com/docs/3dmotion/mixamo.md): Using Mixamo animations with MetaPerson
- [DeepMotion SayMotion](https://docs.metaperson.avatarsdk.com/docs/3dmotion/saymotion.md): Using DeepMotion SayMotion with MetaPerson

- [Getting started](https://docs.metaperson.avatarsdk.com/docs/business-integration/getting_started.md): Getting started
- [Working with MetaPerson Creator](https://docs.metaperson.avatarsdk.com/docs/business-integration/index.md): Working with MetaPerson Creator
